data.title: implementation-plan re-invocation guard: ticket deps may return non-child relationships, causing false short-circuit
data.description: The re-invocation guard uses 'ticket deps <story-id> --include-archived' to find children, but ticket deps returns all dependency relationships (not just parent-child). If the story has sibling or cross-story dependencies linked to it, those would be incorrectly treated as children, potentially causing the guard to classify non-child tasks as closed and short-circuit with STATUS:complete when the story still needs tasks created. Guard should document or verify that deps output is filtered to direct children only.
